name: Gobhi Samosa (Cauliflower Pastry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon ghee in a skillet. Saute the cumin seeds until golden.
2. Add onion, cauliflower, and peas; mix well.
3. Mix in asafetida and green mango powder; stir.
4. Add garam masala, salt, and cayenne. Cover the pan and cook over moderate heat for 10 minutes.
5. Remove the pan from the heat and let it cool.
6. Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions.
7. Take one half-moon of pastry and brush the edges with water.
8. Fold into a cone shape. Fill the pastry with one portion of cauliflower mixture and seal the top.
9. Repeat with the remaining pastry.
10. Heat sufficient ghee (or vegetable oil) in a wok or large skillet to deep fry 4 samosas at a time.
11. When very hot, deep-fry each samosa for a few minutes until golden brown, flipping once to cook both sides.
12. Drain on paper towels.
